subject: docs(backend-spec): strip frontend content and make self-contained
body:
Remove frontend implementation details, "Discovered Requirements" section,
and cross-references to other docs. Backend spec now contains only what the
backend needs to implement.

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: backend-spec
Semver: patch
